description_long: This is a flag featuring the national design of Pakistan, consisting of a dark green field with a white vertical stripe at the hoist side. The green portion contains a white crescent moon and a five-pointed star, both positioned centrally within the green area. The flag is attached to a slender, dark-colored vertical pole, which appears to be made of metal. The fabric of the flag is shown as slightly billowing, suggesting it is lightweight and flexible. The flag's surface is smooth with a matte finish, and the colors are vibrant and well-defined. The overall condition of the flag is pristine, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A vibrant Pakistan national flag with a green field, white stripe, crescent, and star, mounted on a slender dark pole. The flag fabric appears smooth and slightly billowing.
description_view_0: The flag is seen edge-on, with only the thin profile of the pole and a slight hint of the flag's fabric visible.
description_view_1: The full design of the Pakistan flag is visible, showing the green field, white stripe, crescent, and star, with the flag billowing outward.
description_view_2: The flag is viewed from the opposite edge, showing only the narrow side of the fabric and the pole, with minimal design visible.
description_view_3: The flag is seen from the back, with the green field and white stripe visible, and the crescent and star appearing in reverse.
attribute_flag_design: The flag features a dark green field with a vertical white stripe at the hoist, a white crescent moon, and a five-pointed star. The crescent and star are centered in the green area, with the white stripe occupying about one-fourth of the flag's width. This is the national flag of Pakistan.
